markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Reset the GrowthX content strategy to drive significant traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Goal:** The partnership's objective is now to 10x organic traffic, as current performance is flat.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** GrowthX will focus on top-of-funnel (ToFU) content (e.g., glossaries) to act as an SEO "net," driving traffic to Aembit's high-converting, product-focused articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**Quality is Non-Negotiable:** Aembit's review burden is unsustainable due to frequent technical errors (e.g., the "MCP authorization server" definition). GrowthX must improve its research pipeline to build trust and enable velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**Execution:** The current glossary initiative continues in parallel. Vivek will present a new ToFU content plan next week to begin the 10x traffic push.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Stagnant Traffic & High Review Burden

  - [**Performance:** Organic traffic is flat week-over-week (477 views), with no major spikes.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Content quality issues create an unsustainable review burden for Aembit.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [**Example:** A recent glossary definition for "MCP authorization server" was technically incorrect.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [**Impact:** This lack of trust prevents Aembit from approving higher-velocity publishing, as every piece requires deep scrutiny.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

### Proposed Solution: ToFU "Bait" Strategy

  - [Vivek proposed a new strategy based on GrowthX's success with technical clients like Strapi and Galileo.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**GrowthX Content:** Broad, top-of-funnel (ToFU) articles optimized for wide SEO reach.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Aembit Content:** Deep, product-oriented articles written in-house for high conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [**Workflow:** GrowthX content acts as "bait," driving search traffic to Aembit's core articles via internal links.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This approach improves velocity and maintains a high-quality blog aesthetic by separating broad SEO content from core thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)

### Decision: Adopt ToFU Strategy, Prioritizing Quality

  - [Apurva approved the ToFU strategy but stressed that quality is the primary enabler of velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
  - [**Key Directives:**](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
      - [**Lead the Program:** GrowthX must proactively propose what works, not just ask for requests.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Focus on Traffic:** The immediate goal is 10x traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [**Maintain Technical Reputation:** All content must be accurate to preserve Aembit's credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**Execution Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
      - [The current glossary initiative will continue.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
      - [Vivek will present a detailed ToFU content plan next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)

### Production & Performance Update

  - [**Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
      - [**Published:** 7 glossary pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)
      - [**In Review:** 5 articles, 5 glossary items.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=2075.0)
      - [**Returned for Edits:** \~10 items.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=2082.0)
  - [**Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
      - [Organic traffic is flat week-over-week (477 views).](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
      - [The "two-legged vs. three-legged OAuth" article remains a top performer.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=2163.0)
      - [22 glossary pages are now indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [**Process Improvements:**](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=2218.0)
      - [**Query Tracking:** Now using Looker (direct GSC data) for more accurate keyword analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=2218.0)
      - [**Deadlines:** A new column in the OS triggers automated deadline reminders.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:** Present a detailed ToFU content plan next week to drive 10x traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
  - [**Ehtisham:** Address comments on the \~10 items returned for edits.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=2082.0)
  - [**All:** Continue the current glossary production and review process in parallel.](https://fathom.video/share/Amju-52Y92ppuDLY9jdhG9c-ywy6RiJp?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
